subject: Sports
title: North London Derby: Arsenal vs Tottenham
description: A 60-second lesson on North London Derby: Arsenal vs Tottenham.

hook.text: Four miles apart in north London. Arsenal and Tottenham share a neighborhood but not a kind word.

buildup.text: Arsenal moved to north London in 1913—into Tottenham's territory. Spurs have resented them ever since.

discovery.text: Arsenal's invincible 2003-04 season—going unbeaten all league—included a victory at White Hart Lane that stung Spurs deeply.

twist.text: Tottenham's legendary trophy drought—'Lads, it's Tottenham'—became a meme that Arsenal fans use relentlessly.

climax.text: The north London derby regularly delivers drama: red cards, last-minute winners, and atmosphere that shakes the ground.

punchline.text: Four miles, 110 years, and still no peace in north London.

quiz.question: Why does Tottenham resent Arsenal?
options: Arsenal moved into north London—Tottenham's territory—in 1913
Arsenal was founded by former Tottenham players
They compete for the same stadium
